Dear Yogiraj Kapoor,

We are pleased to inform you that after careful consideration, you have been accepted into the Bow Valley College in Calgary for the upcoming academic year. We received a large number of applications, but your academic record and personal statement impressed us the most.

As per your application, we would like to offer you a place in our Bachelor of Arts program, starting from September 1st, 2026. The program will provide you with a comprehensive education in the humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences. Our faculty members are highly experienced and dedicated to helping you achieve your academic goals.

The offer letter includes the following details:

* Program: Bachelor of Arts
* Start date: September 1st, 2026
* Duration: 4 years
* Tuition fees: $20,000 per year
* Living expenses: $15,000 per year

To confirm your acceptance, please sign and return the attached offer letter by August 15th, 2026. You will also need to pay a non-refundable deposit of $1,000 to secure your place in the program.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are more than happy to assist you.

Congratulations once again on your acceptance, and we look forward to welcoming you to our community of scholars.

Sincerely,
Admissions Committee
Bow Valley College
